name: open-context
author: Lightwork
description: Open Context - All your context in one place

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "cross-env NODE_ENV=development next dev -p 3100" "wait-on http://localhost:3100 && node scripts/build-electron.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.mcp.json && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.electron:publish: npm run build && npm run electron:prebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
